description: Product Description About Dollger RIMLESS OVERSIZED Square Flat Top Sunglasses —Fashion Oversized Square Siamese Lens Sunglasses. —Shade Lenses can block 100% of both UVA and UVB radiation,Anti-glare and Anti-dazzle to protect your eyes. —Fashion cool sunglasses are suitable for high-end accessories and daily clothing,Looks super high fashion. PRODUCT DIMENSIONS Nose Bridge: 13 mm (0.51 in) Temple Length: 145 mm (5.7 in) Lens Width: 69 mm (2.71 in) Lens Height: 55 mm (2.16 in) PACKAGE INCLUDED 1* Quality Sunglasses 1* Microfiber Pouch 1* Microfiber Cleaning Cloth 1* Small repair screwdriver Clean the lens using water or mild detergent only. Let the sunglasses into the case when you don't use them. The sunglasses should be treated carefully to avoid damage. And cleaned regularly. Do not expose sunglasses to high temperatures or damp environments in a long term. More Details All-in-one nose pad, stable and comfortable. Thick and thin temples, metal bars inlaid, show elegance and fashion. Flaxible frame, one size fit! Frame less surface makes you temperamental and cool. Enjoy the Gentleness of THE Sun with Dollger Sunglasses
